item.title: The spiritual world today is missing masculinity
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Casa de JuJu)
item.description: Original post available here The spiritual world today is missing masculinity. Traditionally, men were the spiritual anchors of their communities: shamans, sages, monks, prophets, priests. The rishis in India, the desert fathers in early Christianity, the Stoic philosophers, and indigenous medicine men. These were men who withdrew from the world not because they were weak, but because they were devoted to something higher, and from that space they brought wisdom back to the tribe.
